overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a rustic bathroom with stone walls and modern fixtures. The character moves from the sink area past a shower enclosure toward a doorway leading to sleeping quarters.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic bathroom entrance with stone walls and metal sinks

events.description: character turns from facing the closed door to face the wall-mounted sinks

agents.ego_description: character walks toward the metal sinks and looks around the washing area near the entrance

entered.detail: metal door with CLOSED sign painted in black letters
rustic rough-hewn stone wall with warm texture
wall-mounted stainless steel sinks with exposed plumbing fixtures
rectangular warm yellow light fixtures mounted above the sinks
small wooden stool with toiletries placed next to the sinks

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a narrow bathroom with rustic stone walls and warm artificial lighting. A door marked CLOSED is visible to the left while wall-mounted metal sinks line the right wall. The character turns to examine the sink area, revealing a small wooden stool with toiletries.

scene_state.functional_zone: shower area with glass enclosure and storage shelves

events.description: character walks toward the back of the bathroom approaching the shower area
moves from the sink area into the shower zone with glass enclosure

agents.ego_description: character approaches the glass shower enclosure and examines the metal storage shelves with towels and bottles

entered.detail: glass-walled shower cubicle with metal framing and shower fixtures
tall metal shelving unit stocked with white bottles and folded towels
corrugated metal roll-up shutter door on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the bathroom toward a glass-enclosed shower area. Metal shelves stocked with supplies line the back wall, and a corrugated metal shutter door becomes visible on the right. The stone wall and sinks from the entrance recede to the left as the character explores the shower zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: doorway transition from bathroom to sleeping quarters

events.description: character approaches the doorway leading to the adjacent bedroom with bunk beds
character slows and stops at the threshold looking into the bedroom

agents.ego_description: character walks toward the bedroom doorway and pauses at the threshold looking at the bunk beds inside

entered.detail: arched metal doorway frame with riveted edges leading to the next room
stacked metal bunk beds visible through the doorway in the sleeping quarters
tall metal locker cabinet next to the doorway

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the shower area toward a doorway on the right side of the bathroom. Through the arched metal doorway, a sleeping quarters with bunk beds becomes visible. The character approaches the threshold and pauses, with the metal shutter door now prominent on the right and the bathroom fixtures falling behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic, stone-walled bathroom that gradually opens into a glimpse of sleeping quarters. It begins by examining a row of metal sinks and a small wooden stool under warm artificial lighting, with a closed door visible to the left. As the character moves deeper into the room, the sinks recede to the left and the scene shifts toward a glass-enclosed shower area flanked by metal supply shelves and a corrugated shutter door. The camera then glides past the shower zone, turning toward an arched metal doorway on the right. Finally, the bathroom fixtures fall behind as the view expands through the threshold to reveal a room containing bunk beds.
